prompt: Create a highly realistic vertical selfie-style portrait of a young adult East Asian woman cosplaying in a Japanese sailor school uniform, framed from the chest upward as if taken with a phone at arm’s length. She has dark black-brown slightly messy medium-length hair tied back loosely, with wispy bangs and flyaway strands around the head. Her face is completely hidden by one large centered opaque square privacy censor block, colored warm muted brown, covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin. She wears a crisp white sailor-style blouse with blue plaid trim on the collar and sleeve cuffs, a navy necktie, and a small chest pocket. The setting is a softly lit cozy bedroom with a pale cream wall, a bed on the right, a plush teddy bear in the background, and a softly glowing lamp or vanity area on the left, all background details slightly blurred with shallow depth of field. Use natural indoor lighting, realistic fabric folds, fine hair detail, soft skin tones visible at the neck and arm, casual candid composition, no text, no watermark.
